model.name: transformDataType
model.title: Transform Data Type
model.description: Transforms the message body based on known data type transformers.
model.label: eip,transformation

id.description: Sets the id of this node. Important: If you want to set the id of the route, then you must use routeId(String) instead.

note.description: Sets the note of this node

description.description: Sets the description of this node

disabled.label: advanced
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

fromType.description: The source data type for the transformation.

toType.description: The target data type for the transformation.
